Interface AutoSemaphore.Token

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AutoSemaphoreImpl.TokenImpl, TimeoutSemaphoreImpl.TokenImpl
Enclosing interface:
AutoSemaphore
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: AutoSemaphore.java 1250 2026-05-25 16:55:30Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.25.2") public static sealed interface AutoSemaphore.Token extends AutoCloseable permits AutoSemaphoreImpl.TokenImpl, TimeoutSemaphoreImpl.TokenImpl

The definition of a token that holds the permits to be released when a try-with-resources block is left.

Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Version:
$Id: AutoSemaphore.java 1250 2026-05-25 16:55:30Z tquadrat $
